purpose: Declare qiaomu-ppt runtime dependencies for open-source installation and reproducible deck production.

core_packages.used_for: Low-complexity fallback editable PPTX generation, native PPTX package assembly support, and visible-text QA in scripts/pptx_from_slide_plan.py, scripts/svg_to_pptx.py, and scripts/pptx_text_check.py.
Thumbnail contact-sheet generation in scripts/pptx_preview.py, scripts/svg_preview.py, and image utilities.
Browser-accurate SVG screenshot previews in scripts/svg_preview.py, formal HTML screenshot QA in scripts/export_bundle.py, and optional JS-heavy source capture.
Optional explicit real image generation in scripts/run_image_generation.py when the operator provides an API key environment variable. Dry-run planning does not require a key.

optional_enhancements.used_for: Stronger Office document conversion, image OCR when configured, and mixed-source intake in scripts/source_to_markdown.py.
Optional high-quality SVG-to-PNG fallback images for Office compatibility mode in scripts/svg_to_pptx.py.
Optional fallback SVG-to-PNG renderer when CairoSVG is unavailable.
Optional WeChat public-account article extraction with Markdown output and local image downloads when generic URL extraction is weak.
optional_enhancements.install: uv tool install wechat-article-to-markdown or pipx install wechat-article-to-markdown

optional_enhancements.used_for: Optional route for WeChat article crawling projects that need rendered pages, MicroMessenger UA, and hotlink-safe image downloads.
optional_enhancements.install: python3 -m pip install crawl4ai aiohttp && crawl4ai-setup

optional_enhancements.used_for: Optional NotebookLM raster watermark cleanup in scripts/notebooklm_raster_watermark.py and scripts/strip_notebooklm_watermark.py --inpaint-raster-watermark.

external_tools.name: NotebookLM CLI
external_tools.used_for: Optional NotebookLM-native slide-deck route in scripts/notebooklm_deck.py: source add, Fast/Deep Research, generate slide-deck, and download PPTX/PDF.
external_tools.manual_install: Install the local notebooklm CLI and run notebooklm login
external_tools.agent_install_policy: Agent may check availability and status. Do not upload private sources to NotebookLM unless the user explicitly requested NotebookLM or approved the external upload route.

external_tools.name: Node.js
external_tools.used_for: Optional CSS/Canvas/WebGL procedural background rendering, GSAP/Lottie browser-library self-hosting, and static raster export for HTML previews.

external_tools.name: LibreOffice
external_tools.used_for: PPTX to PDF/image preview conversion and native export checks when PowerPoint/Keynote are unavailable.
external_tools.official_download_note: Use this official LibreOffice download page when Homebrew/apt is unavailable or an agent cannot install system packages.
external_tools.agent_install_policy: Agent may run the declared package-manager install command after the user asks to set up qiaomu-ppt dependencies. Prefer package managers over direct DMG/manual downloads.

external_tools.name: Poppler
external_tools.used_for: PDF text extraction and PDF-to-image thumbnail rendering.

external_tools.name: ImageMagick
external_tools.used_for: Optional image optimization, contact-sheet generation, and format conversion.

external_tools.name: Playwright Chromium
external_tools.used_for: Optional login/JS-heavy page capture when direct URL ingestion is blocked.
external_tools.install: python3 -m pip install playwright && python3 -m playwright install chromium

external_tools.name: Keynote
external_tools.used_for: Optional macOS Keynote import/save verification, .key delivery through scripts/export_bundle.py, Keynote 09 fallback export, and staged failure diagnosis plus minimal PPTX baseline control through scripts/keynote_probe.py.
external_tools.macos_install: Install Keynote from the Mac App Store.
external_tools.agent_install_policy: Agent may attempt AppleScript automation only when Keynote.app is installed. If automation is blocked, times out, or cannot refresh a stale .key package to be at least as fresh as the current PPTX, record Keynote as failed or missing evidence in export_manifest.json.

external_tools.name: Archive extractor
external_tools.used_for: Optional repair downloads for 7z-packaged font families such as Sarasa Gothic.
external_tools.macos_install: brew install libarchive or brew install p7zip
external_tools.ubuntu_install: sudo apt-get install libarchive-tools or sudo apt-get install p7zip-full

fonts.note: The curated PPT font kit is declared in the manifest and can be bundled or repaired with the download command.

optional_procedural_background_engines.self_contained_default: scripts/procedural_background_pack.py generates deterministic SVG assets without Node.js.
optional_procedural_background_engines.policy: Optional JS libraries are allowed for project-specific HTML previews, but public qiaomu-ppt output must still degrade to deterministic SVG/Python backgrounds.

browser_packages.used_for: Timeline choreography for DOM/SVG/CSS formal HTML deck elements.
browser_packages.runtime_policy: Copy a local browser build into the project asset folder or clearly list the external dependency in html_motion_manifest.json.

browser_packages.used_for: Playback of After Effects / Bodymovin JSON animation assets in formal HTML decks.
browser_packages.runtime_policy: Use local .json assets and set autoplay false unless the manifest explicitly records a finite loop need.

browser_packages.used_for: Playback of packaged .lottie assets in formal HTML decks.
browser_packages.runtime_policy: Use local .lottie assets and provide a poster/static fallback for cinematic motion.

optional_html_motion_engines.policy: HTML motion is opt-in. Final/professional HTML decks that use authored motion must include html_motion_manifest.json, respect prefers-reduced-motion, keep a readable static state, and pass validate_html_deck.py with --motion-manifest.

degradation_policy: If Python URL packages are missing, run scripts/bootstrap.py --install-python or use direct Markdown/local files.
If image generation is unavailable, run scripts/procedural_background_pack.py and record procedural_fallback_policy in visual_contract.json.
If Node.js is missing, use deterministic SVG/Python procedural backgrounds instead of Canvas/WebGL; for HTML motion, use already-packaged local browser assets or downgrade to CSS/static motion.
If LibreOffice is missing, run scripts/bootstrap.py --install-system and rerun scripts/bootstrap.py --check before claiming PPTX-to-PDF preview verification.
If Poppler is missing, use pypdf fallback for PDF text extraction and mark layout fidelity as missing evidence.
If fonts are missing, use system CJK and Latin fonts and record typography as missing evidence for exact rendering.
If Keynote.app or AppleScript automation is unavailable, still deliver PPTX/PDF/HTML where possible and record the Keynote gap in export_manifest.json.
